**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Dan Yu Qing Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. provides a highly magical 'cross-dimensional mislabeling' specimen. The system has cleared the underlying fake multinational consumer electronics supply chain data derived from Apple Inc. The official registry system experienced a shocking recognition disaster here: forcefully categorizing a company named 'Electronic Technology' into the broad category of 'Automobile Manufacturing - Complete Automobile Manufacturing.' However, the forensic physical probe revealed the absurd bottom line of this 'new car-making force': the 2024 insured headcount is '0 people,' and the registered address is located at 'Room 1603,' Building 5, No. 1 Shangshuli, Qinhuai District. In a single-room apartment on the 16th floor, relying on 0 employees to manufacture complete automobiles? Or to perform the 'digital printing equipment manufacturing' and 'cold sheet metal work' listed in its license? This completely violates human industrial common sense. Deeply analyzing its hundreds-of-words-long 'universal business license,' from sales of clothing, shoes, hats, watches, and bags, all the way to computer system integration, and finally abruptly adding 'factory building demolition, repair, and mechanical equipment demolition engineering construction.' Diagnostic conclusion: this is an extremely typical 'Universal Trading & Engineering SPV (Special Purpose Vehicle) / proxy shell.' It manufactures neither cars nor electronic products; it is purely an invoicing channel used by the boss (Zhou Gongwei) to resell sundries, take on small IT projects, and undertake factory demolition to resell scrap equipment.
